name: SCORING_CONTRACT_V1
purpose: Normalized external-benchmark scoring contract for real-domain drum evaluation
pitchMappingNotes: tops: 42=Closed HH, 43=High Floor Tom, 44=Pedal HH, 45=Low Tom, 46=Open HH
notes: Promotion is based on real blind holdout improvement.
Synthetic pass rate is a regression guard only (>=90%).
Holdout split boundary is immutable once generated.
